primaryLines.description: Clean, direct parent-child connections representing organizational hierarchy without curved clutter.

secondaryLines.description: Cross-branch transverse links that bow outwards to prevent overlapping through the core tree center.

pillLabels.borderColor: ENTITY_TYPES[node.type].color — matches the node variant colour (e.g. #00f2ff for CONCEPT, #ff007a for PATTERN, #ffe600 for PROCEDURE, #ffffff for VARIANT, #bd00ff for SCENARIO)

labels.fontFamily: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

search.inputContainer: w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-20px shadow-lg
search.tierListDropdown: w-full max-h-80 overflow-y-auto rounded-xl border mt-1 flex flex-col gap-3 p-3 transition-all duration-300 scrollbar-thin backdrop-blur-25px shadow-2xl
search.tierHeader: text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider px-1 py-0.5 border-b pb-1 color matching entity tier colors

aesthetics.translucency: glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl and multi-tiered borders
aesthetics.gradient: Sage Green/Teal var(--gradient-primary) for active states
aesthetics.regionalisation: GBP £ for usage display, British English context tags
aesthetics.sidebarToggles: Symmetric vertical gaps (exactly 8px margin offset) with mode-switcher container matching design guidelines
aesthetics.topbarLayout: Model Selection toggle sits in the left topbar tool container immediately to the right of the Gem/Role selector

behavior.resizeMultiplier: 2x scroll scaling for lists, 5px touch drag threshold
behavior.activeFeedback: 0.98x haptic scaling on active touch clicks

aesthetics.alignment: Strictly centered layout with 480px overflow protection
aesthetics.preWrap: Full-text pre-wrap without truncation for tooltips and hover modals

aesthetics.itemPadding: Right padding set to 68px to prevent overlapping of the absolute pin and delete action buttons
aesthetics.searchBar: Glassmorphic search input field positioned under the header with Lucide Search icon decoration
aesthetics.pinToggle: Tilt rotation micro-interaction (45 degrees) when unpinned, direct vertical rotation and high-contrast accent highlight color when pinned
aesthetics.confirmModal: Inline glassmorphic action buttons for single-click confirmation of mass deletion of conversation records

aesthetics.styling: Google Antigravity Premium dark translucent overlay border border-brand-cyan/20 px-3.5 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-2xl pointer-events-none select-none font-mono text-[10px] tracking-wider text-brand-cyan uppercase

styling.dark: bg-black/60 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[12px] shadow-3xl flex items-center gap-1.5 p-1 transition-all duration-300
styling.light: bg-[#EDE5D8]/80 border border-[#2E2B27]/15 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[12px] shadow-3xl flex items-center gap-1.5 p-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.dark: w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-[8px] transition-all text-slate-500 hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white active:scale-[0.95]
buttons.light: w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-[8px] transition-all text-[#6A645D] hover:bg-[#2E2B27]/5 hover:text-[#2E2B27] active:scale-[0.95]

dividers.dark: w-px h-4 bg-white/10 mx-0.5 self-center transition-colors duration-300
dividers.light: w-px h-4 bg-[#2E2B27]/15 mx-0.5 self-center transition-colors duration-300

aesthetics.translucency: glassmorphism with backdrop-blur-xl using dynamic backdrop filters
aesthetics.borderRadius: rounded-3xl (24px) conforming to the primary design system
aesthetics.shadow: shadow-lg matching soft ambient light parameters
aesthetics.categoryIndicator: Left category accent border stripe on the title card header block to preserve color identification without heavy top border visual clutter

aesthetics.borderRadius: rounded-3xl (24px) conforming to the primary design system
aesthetics.shadow: shadow-lg matching soft ambient light parameters

cards.text: italic Inter text with Start/End metadata badges

aesthetics.borderRadius: rounded-2xl (16px) conforming to premium cards system
aesthetics.size: 220px width by 160px height absolute top-10 right-10 z-[2000]

primary.style: dashed stroke on top [3, 3] line dash pattern

secondary.style: solid stroke at bottom layer 1.5px width

behavior.dragScaling: dynamic coordinate conversion based on canvas-space min/max bounds and fitting scale

aesthetics.container: relative w-full max-w-6xl h-[85vh] rounded-[var(--radius-xl)] shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden border border-[var(--glass-border)] bg-[var(--bg-overlay)] backdrop-blur-[40px]
aesthetics.tabsHeader: flex items-center bg-[var(--bg-elevated)] p-[3px] rounded-full border border-[var(--glass-border)] gap-[2px] overflow-x-auto scrollbar-none

bentoCards.layout: grid layout panels with border border-[var(--glass-border)] bg-[var(--bg-secondary)] rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] p-5 shadow-sm shadow-inner textareas/inputs
bentoCards.nestedTree: directory tree browser with collapsible nodes and left borders on active indentation branches

aesthetics.activeTabState: var(--gradient-primary) with var(--shadow-glow) active highlights and Framer Motion spring fade-in transitions

behavior.draggableScroll: useDraggableScroll for grab-to-scroll horizontal overflow header tags
behavior.scaleHaptic: 0.95x active scaling feedback on active control clicks

cardButton.base: group relative p-4 border-2 rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] flex flex-col gap-2 transition-all text-left
cardButton.active: Border matches dynamic category color (v.color), Background uses 5% opacity tint of category color (v.color + '15'), Box-shadow glow matches category color (v.color + '25')
cardButton.inactive: Border is var(--glass-border), Background is var(--bg-secondary)

typography.title: text-xs font-semibold colored in category color (v.color)

predictiveTagging.container: p-5 rounded-2xl flex items-start gap-4 mb-4 border transition-all bg-[var(--accent-indigo)]/5 border-[var(--accent-indigo)]/10
predictiveTagging.dottedBoxes: font-semibold border border-dotted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded mx-1 text-[var(--accent-indigo)] border-[var(--accent-indigo)] bg-[var(--accent-indigo)]/5

aesthetics.position: absolute top-20 left-8 z-[100] w-64 pointer-events-auto
aesthetics.container: flex flex-col gap-1.5 p-3 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[16px] border border-white/10 shadow-3xl relative

controls.sliders: w-full h-1 bg-white/10 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-brand-cyan

footerButtons.layout: flex gap-1.5 justify-center border-t border-white/5 pt-3 mt-1
footerButtons.button: px-3 py-1.5 text-[9px] font-black tracking-wider rounded-lg border transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 w-1/2 justify-center

aesthetics.dimensions: SVG 900x800 viewBox with centered radial layout (cx=450, cy=400)

rings.baseRadius: 100px inner base radius for core focused root circle
rings.ringWidth: 75px width for each nested concentric ring layer

sectors.stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) for separation in dark mode, rgba(10, 15, 25, 0.2) in light mode

opacity.unselected: 0.22 fill opacity showing soft, glowing ring partitions
opacity.hovered: 0.75 fill opacity for strong active slice highlight

secondaryConnections.strokeWidth: 1.5px dashed connection paths curved through control controls
secondaryConnections.controlOffset: Ctrl points bowed 50% towards origin (cx, cy) to render graceful curves passing through center

typography.ringText: font-bold tracking-tight text-[7px] rotated by theta middle, flipped 180 degrees if facing upside-down (between 90 and 270 degrees)

aesthetics.tooltip: glassmorphic hover panel with backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10, bg-black/75, and entity-specific color tags

search.inputContainer: w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-20px shadow-lg
search.tierListDropdown: w-full max-h-80 overflow-y-auto rounded-xl border mt-1 flex flex-col gap-3 p-3 transition-all duration-300 scrollbar-thin backdrop-blur-25px shadow-2xl

aesthetics.nodes: absolute w-56 p-1 glass-panel with border-l-4 rounded-xl transition-all duration-500
aesthetics.links: cubic bezier curves representing structural and transverse relationships with dynamic opacity and pulse layers

search.inputContainer: w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-20px shadow-lg
search.tierListDropdown: w-full max-h-80 overflow-y-auto rounded-xl border mt-1 flex flex-col gap-3 p-3 transition-all duration-300 scrollbar-thin backdrop-blur-25px shadow-2xl

aesthetics.background: #ffffff (Pure White for high readability on copy-paste text, lists, tables, and images)
aesthetics.fontSize: 12pt default base size for body text

inlineTags.active: Border and background based on dynamic category color, text inherits tag color with high contrast on white background
inlineTags.potential: Border is dotted rgba(8,145,178,0.4), Background is rgba(8,145,178,0.05), Text is #000000

media.images: max-width: 100%, border-radius: 8px, margin: 8px 0, border: 1px solid var(--glass-border)
media.tables: border-collapse: collapse, width: 100%, border: 1px solid var(--glass-border), padding: 8px

toolbar.fontSizes: Pt-based font size values represented in a combo input/datalist to allow both direct manual typing and selection dropdown
toolbar.headings: Heading level selection dropdown (H1 to H6, and Paragraph) wrapping selected text only

colorPalette.customColorWheel: Circular color selector styled with a conic-gradient(red, yellow, lime, aqua, blue, magenta, red) background, opening the native picker with absolute opacity-0, and automatically appending newly chosen colors to the default swatches for future use

aesthetics.pasteSanitization: Strips inline styling for font-size, color, font-family, and background properties on standard text elements (SPAN, P, FONT) to guarantee pasted clipboard text falls back to clean, uniform 12pt black layouts.
